description:
Transcribe audio files using Speech-to-Text technology with the Deepgram Nova-3 model, featuring multi-language support and advanced customizable settings.

[1] Basic Features: 
- Generate PDF to generate a PDF file of the transcription. This is disabled by default 
- Diarize to identify different speakers in the audio. This will automatically enable utterances. This is disabled by default.
- Smart format to set automatic format text for improved readability including punctuation and paragraphs. This feature is enabled by default.

[2] Advanced Features:
-Dictation to convert spoken commands for punctuation into their respective marks (e.g., 'period' becomes '.'). This will automatically enable punctuation. This is disabled by default.
- Measurements to format spoken measurement units into abbreviations. This is disabled by default
- Profanity filter to replace profanity with asterisks. This is disabled by default.
- Redact PCI to redact payment card information. This is disabled by default.
- Redact PII to redact personally identifiable information. This is disabled by default.
- Utterances to segment speech into meaningful semantic units. This is disabled by default.
- Paragraphs. This feature split audio into paragraphs to improve transcript readability. This will automatically enable punctuation. This is enabled by default.
- Punctuate. This feature add punctuation and capitalization to your transcript. This is enabled by default.
- Numerals. This feature convert numbers from written format to numerical format. This is enabled by default.

[3] Languages Supported:
Auto-detect (Default)
English
Spanish
French
German
Italian
Portuguese
Japanese
Chinese
Hindi
Russian
Dutch

[4] Key Terms. Enter important terms to improve recognition accuracy, separated by commas. English only, Limited to 500 tokens total.
